title: 宝塚記念の後に・トップ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Biwa Hayahide wins with a blowout victory!
What an incredible time!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Both of these sisters are absolutely amazing! The
stage is now set for a sibling showdown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm back. We've done it. We've seized victory.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thanks. That's another one on the books, huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I... I really did it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I took first place among the very select few that
are invited to participate in the Takarazuka
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles proudly.
choice_data_list: You've worked so hard for this.
You've worked so hard for this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We both did! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But we have some work to do. I still need to beat
Brian in a race for the ages.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And there's one question I must answer before we
can make our battle a reality.
choice_data_list:
Is it which race you want to compete against her
in?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, I've managed to gather some data
pertaining to that issue. Take a look at these
articles

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"Narita Brian Aims for the Kikuka Sho"... That's no
surprise. I'm sure she'll become a Triple Crown
Champion.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then there's these. "Potential Year-End Sisterly
Showdown?" and "Is the Arima Kinen in Narita
Brian's Future?"...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As these articles suggest, I believe she'll go to the
Arima Kinen instead of the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And I know she'll show up to the race in perfect
condition.
choice_data_list:
So the showdown will be at the Arima Kinen,
huh?

So the showdown will be at the Arima Kinen,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It looks that way. While she's honing her skills in
the Kikuka Sho, I want to make my mark in a G1
race this fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We need to schedule everything around the
Arima Kinen. We'll have to prepare for a battle of
sheer speed against Narita Brian.
choice_data_list: Let's tackle the autumn Tenno Sho, then.
Let's tackle the autumn Tenno Sho, then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence. I was just about to suggest
the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrrrrmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from the Hanshin Racecourse,
we set our sights on the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear Biwa Hayahide breathing softly as she
sleeps in the seat next to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been falling fast asleep after almost every
race lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no surprise. Putting everything she has into
each race must be exhausting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to come up with a plan to help her
recover from the fatigue and keep her at peak
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come up with as many ideas as I can for her on
the bus ride home.
